f16_tiled.description: Register-tiled prefill matmul (transpose_b=1 row-major B): 4x4 thread tile, 64x64 workgroup tile, 16x outputs/workgroup vs base

f16w_f32a_tiled.description: Register-tiled prefill matmul: f32 activations, f16 weights, f32 output. 4x4 thread tile, 64x64 workgroup tile.

gemv.description: Optimized GEMV for M=1 decode: uses shared memory for A vector

gemv_f16a.description: Optimized GEMV for M=1 decode with f16 activations + f16 output

gemv_subgroup_f16a.description: Subgroup-optimized GEMV with f16 activations + f16 output

gemv_subgroup_cols8_f16a.description: Subgroup GEMV with 8 columns per workgroup (f16 activations/output)

gemv_subgroup_vec4_cols8_f16a.description: Subgroup GEMV vec4 with 8 columns per workgroup (f16 activations/output)

gemv_subgroup_multicol.description: Multi-column GEMV for large vocab (LM head F16) - 32 columns per workgroup

gemv_subgroup_multicol_f16a.description: Multi-column GEMV for large vocab (LM head F16) - f16 activations/output

gemv_subgroup_cols64.description: Cooperative 4-thread GEMV - 64 columns per workgroup, 4 threads per column (experimental)

gemv_subgroup_cols64_f16a.description: Cooperative 4-thread GEMV f16a - 64 columns per workgroup, 4 threads per column (experimental)

gemv_subgroup_vec4_cols64_f16a.description: Cooperative 4-thread GEMV f16a vec4 - 64 columns per workgroup with vec4 loads (experimental)

litert_int4_multicol_f16a.description: LiteRT fixed-affine INT4 batched matmul with f16 activations and f16 output; keeps Gemma 4 split-package weights packed on GPU

litert_int4_multicol_f16a_f32out.description: LiteRT fixed-affine INT4 batched matmul with f16 activations and f32 output; keeps Gemma 4 split-package weights packed on GPU

litert_int4_multicol_f32a_f32out.description: LiteRT fixed-affine INT4 batched matmul with f32 activations and f32 output; keeps Gemma 4 split-package logits packed on GPU

w4a16_multicol_f16a.description: Compressed-tensors W4A16 packed matmul with f16 activations and f16 output; keeps QAT weights packed on GPU with per-row-group scales

w4a16_multicol_f16a_f32out.description: Compressed-tensors W4A16 packed matmul with f16 activations and f32 output; keeps QAT weights packed on GPU with per-row-group scales

w4a16_batched_f16a.description: Compressed-tensors W4A16 packed batched prefill matmul with f16 activations and f16 output; keeps QAT weights packed on GPU with per-row-group scales

w4a16_batched_f16a_f32out.description: Compressed-tensors W4A16 packed batched prefill matmul with f16 activations and f32 output; keeps QAT weights packed on GPU with per-row-group scales

q4_fused_batched_multicol_shared.description: Shared-A Q4_K prefill matmul: 4 rows x 8 columns per workgroup while preserving block/subblock traversal

q4_fused_multicol.description: Multi-column GEMV for large vocab (LM head) - 32 columns per workgroup

q4_fused_gemv.description: Optimised fused Q4K GEMV - shared-A cooperative load + fast nibble extraction for maximum M=1 decode throughput without f16 precision loss

q4_fused_multicol_f16.description: Multi-column GEMV for large vocab (LM head) - F16 output

q4_fused_multicol_f16a.description: Multi-column GEMV for large vocab (LM head) - F16 input/output

q4_fused_multicol_f16a_f32acc.description: F16 IO + F32 accumulator twin of q4_fused_multicol_f16a. Closes the f16-accum decode-gemv gap on AMD RDNA3 where f32 accumulation outperforms f16 by ~60%.

q4_fused_batched_f16acc_f16a.description: Batched Q4_K prefill matmul with f16 activation input, f16 accumulation, and f16 output for experimental all-f16 execution lanes.

q4_fused_prefill_tiled_f16.description: Register-tiled Q4_K prefill matmul: 64x64 outputs per WG via 4x4 register tile per thread, amortizing Q4K dequant across 16x the outputs of q4_fused_batched_f16a.

q4_fused_widetile_f16.description: WideTile Q4_K prefill matmul (adapted from ORT MatMulNBitsWideTile, MIT licensed). Each thread owns 1 output column × TILE_M rows; register-tiled accumulation. F32 A, Q4_K B (llama.cpp 256-block), F16 C. ~128x fewer WGs than q4_fused_batched_f16 at Gemma-4 prefill shape.

q4_fused_widetile_f16a.description: WideTile Q4_K prefill matmul with f16 activation input and f16 output for execution-v1 f16 activation lanes.

q4_fused_widetile.description: F32-output twin of q4_fused_widetile_f16. Same WideTile design, f32 output for callers that need it (e.g. FFN gate/up when activationDtype=f32).

q4_fused_rmsnorm_widetile.description: Fused RMSNorm + Q4_K WideTile matmul. Two-pass: pass 1 computes per-row sum-of-squares across all K; pass 2 reloads A, applies normed*weight + matmul in same tileA buffer. Saves 1 standalone rmsnorm dispatch per fusion point. Bind slot 4 = norm_weight (f32).

q4_fused_widetile_residual.description: WideTile Q4_K matmul fused with residual add in one dispatch. Used at o_proj + attn_residual and ffn_down + ffn_residual call sites to cut 1 dispatch per layer per fusion point (~0.85 ms bubble each).

f16_native.description: Native f16 weight reads via array<f16> bindings (no unpack2x16float)

f16_native_batched.description: Native f16 batched variant for prefill

q4k_f16a.description: Q4K fused FFN with f16 activation reads and f32 output

q4k_batched_f16a.description: Q4K fused FFN batched path with f16 activation reads and f32 output

gate_up_gelu_gated_tiled_f16.description: Fused gate + up FFN projections + GeGLU activation (F16 weights, per-layer intermediate_size uniform)

dequant.description: Dequantization kernels for various quant formats

f32_rowwise.description: Q4_K dequantization with row-wise layout (f32 output)

f16_rowwise.description: Q4_K dequantization with row-wise matrix layout for non-256-aligned K

mxfp4_expert_fused_f16.description: GPT-OSS fused MXFP4 expert dequant kernel with vec4-oriented write path.

attention.description: Flash attention kernels for prefill and decode

prefill_head512_f16kv.description: head_dim=512 variant of prefill_head256_f16kv for Gemma-4 global attention layers. BLOCK_SIZE=16 keeps shared_block at 16KB and avoids VGPR spill from 128 vec4<f32> private arrays per thread (iter 26 measured BLOCK_SIZE=32 at -1.7% due to register pressure).

prefill_head512_f16.description: head_dim=512 pure-f16 activation prefill kernel for Gemma-4 global attention layers.

decode_online_f16.description: Online decode kernel - f16 QKV with subgroup reductions

decode_online_f16kv.description: Online decode kernel - f32 Q with f16 KV and subgroup reductions

decode_chunked_f16.description: Chunked decode kernel - f16 QKV + f16 output

decode_chunked_f16kv.description: Chunked decode kernel - parallelizes headDim for models with few heads

decode_paged_f16.description: Paged decode kernel - f16 Q/K/V with page table indirection

decode_paged_f16kv.description: Paged decode kernel - f16 KV with page table indirection

decode_subgroup.description: Subgroup-optimized decode kernel - 4 barriers (vs 80), 100% thread utilization

attention_tiered.description: Tiered attention kernels (hot ring + cold paged)

decode_tiered_f16.description: Tiered decode kernel - f16 QKV + f16 output

decode_tiered_f16kv.description: Tiered decode kernel - f32 Q + f16 KV

attention_tiered_quant.description: Tiered attention kernels with quantized cold cache

decode_tiered_int8_f16kv.description: Tiered decode kernel - int8 cold K/V with f16 hot K/V

decode_tiered_int4_f16kv.description: Tiered decode kernel - int4 cold K/V with f16 hot K/V

decode_tiered_turboquant_f16kv.description: Tiered decode kernel - TurboQuant MSE cold K/V with f16 hot K/V

decode_tiered_turboquant_prod_f16kv.description: Tiered decode kernel - TurboQuant prod (MSE+QJL) cold K/V with f16 hot K/V

attention_contiguous_quant.description: Contiguous quantized attention kernels for full-attention models

decode_contiguous_turboquant_f16kv.description: Contiguous decode kernel - TurboQuant MSE quantized K/V

decode_contiguous_turboquant_prod_f16kv.description: Contiguous decode kernel - TurboQuant prod (MSE+QJL) quantized K/V

kv_quantize.description: Quantize KV cache for cold tier

int8.description: Quantize KV to int8 (packed u32) with per-head scale

int4.description: Quantize KV to int4 (packed u32) with per-head scale

turboquant.description: TurboQuant MSE: rotation + codebook quantize with per-head norm

turboquant_prod.description: TurboQuant prod: MSE at (b-1) bits + 1-bit QJL residual for unbiased inner products

medium.description: Medium variant for N up to ~4096 (covers Gemma 3's hiddenSize=1152)

medium_f16.description: F16 medium variant for N up to ~4096 (covers Gemma's hiddenSize=2304)

soft_embedding.description: Soft embedding helpers for block-diffusion self-conditioning

diffusion_gemma_sampling.description: Block-diffusion canvas sampling stats for DiffusionGemma

f16.description: F16 embeddings -> F32 output (for weight-tied lm_head optimization)

litert_int4_vec4_f16_out.description: LiteRT signed INT4 affine embeddings -> F16 output

litert_int4_vec4_f32_out.description: LiteRT signed INT4 affine embeddings -> F32 output

gptoss_router_topk.description: GPT-OSS deterministic router top-k kernel (f16 logits/weights).

gemma4_route_q4_matmul.description: Route-wise Gemma4 packed Q4_K expert matmul kernels

moe_offsets.description: Build routing token offsets for dynamic MoE scatter on GPU

split_qkv.description: Split fused QKV output into separate Q, K, V buffers

split_qg.description: De-interleave Q and Gate projections from q_proj output for attentionOutputGate models

rep_penalty.description: GPU-side repetition penalty (modifies logits in-place before sampling)

matmul_backward.description: Matmul backward dX = dY @ W^T (fused tiled kernel)

matmul_transpose_a.description: Matmul with transposed A (C = A^T * B)

attention_backward.description: Attention backward (softmax backward with causal mask)

repeat_channels.description: Repeat channels along the NCHW channel axis

decode_bdpa_f16.description: BDPA decode kernel - f16 Q/basis + packed int8 deltas
